{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Sword Sage’s void space
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Sword Sage’s void space]] is a location [[Lindon]] brought [[Yerin]] to.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c3">''Reaper'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Otherworldly locations]]
